meta.title: Get into BBA in Data Analytics at Teksversity
meta.description: Earn your BBA in Data Analytics and become a data-driven business professional. Master data visualization, BI, AI, and decision analytics with expert mentors.

@graph.name: BBA in Data Analytics
@graph.description: Earn your BBA in Data Analytics and become a data-driven business professional. Learn Power BI, Python, SQL, and AI tools with 100% placement support at Teksversity.

mainEntity.name: What is the BBA in Data Analytics course about?

acceptedAnswer.text: BBA in Data Analytics is a three-year undergraduate degree that blends business management and data analysis. It focuses on using tools and techniques to turn raw data into actionable business insights.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are taught in a BBA Data Analytics program?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course includes Business Analytics, Python, Power BI, Excel, SQL, Data Visualization, Predictive Modelling, and AI concepts for strategic business decisions.

mainEntity.name: What are the career options after completing BBA in Data Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can work as Data Analysts, BI Associates, Market Researchers, Business Strategists, or Data Visualization Experts in industries like IT, finance, and e-commerce.

mainEntity.name: Is Data Analytics a good career choice after BBA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, it’s one of the fastest-growing careers in the world. Data analytics professionals are in high demand for roles that help businesses make smarter, evidence-based decisions.

mainEntity.name: What technical skills are needed for BBA Data Analytics students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students should learn Python, SQL, Excel, Power BI, and data storytelling, along with critical thinking, statistics, and visualization skills.

mainEntity.name: What makes Teksversity’s BBA in Data Analytics program unique?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity combines business strategy with real-time analytics projects, AI-based case studies, and mentorship from experienced data professionals to ensure job readiness.

mainEntity.name: From which university will I get my BBA degree if I study at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students earn their degree from a UGC-recognized university partner, ensuring national and international recognition for higher studies and employment.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide hands-on training and internships for Data Analytics students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students work on live data projects, simulations, and corporate internships using tools like Power BI, Tableau, and Excel Analytics.

mainEntity.name: What kind of placement support does Teksversity offer for BBA in Data Analytics?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides 100% placement assistance, including resume optimization, mock interviews, recruiter tie-ups, and career counseling for data-related roles.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide certification training along with the BBA degree?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students receive guidance for certifications in Power BI, Excel, and Google Analytics to improve their skills and employability.

banner.name: BBA in Data Analytics – Transform Data into Business Decisions
banner.mainHeading: BBA in Data Analytics – Transform Data into Business Decisions
banner.description: Earn your BBA in Data Analytics and become a data-driven strategist shaping smarter business outcomes. Master business analytics, data visualization, and predictive modelling to turn raw data into valuable insights that power real-world decisions and drive innovation.

heading: Why Choose This Program?
benefits: Learn from expert data scientists and business analysts.
Focus on real-world data interpretation and visualization.
Case studies using Python, Power BI, and Excel analytics.
Develop logical reasoning, analytical, and technical skills.
Expertise in AI, business intelligence, and data storytelling.
Exposure to machine learning concepts and big data tools.

reserveYourSpotForm.formDescription: Start your learning journey today. Our experts will reach out to guide you in your next big step!

heading: Overview of
BBA in Data Analytics Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build the Future with Data-Driven Intelligence
overViewOfOnline.description: The Bachelor’s in Data Analytics at Teksversity bridges business management with advanced data interpretation. Students gain practical exposure through real-time projects, data visualization workshops, and business analytics simulations. The program equips learners to collect, process, and analyze data for smarter business decision-making. Graduates are prepared for roles such as Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Associate, Market Research Analyst, and Data Strategist, with opportunities to pursue higher studies like MBA in Analytics or professional certifications in data science and visualization.
keyPoints: Master data visualization and dashboard creation
Build predictive and prescriptive analytics models
Learn SQL, Python, Power BI, and Excel-based analysis
Interpret data to drive strategic business decisions
Gain hands-on project experience through live datasets

heading: Why Choose BBA in Data Analytics in
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity means learning in a future-ready ecosystem that blends business intelligence with analytical expertise. Each module offers immersive exposure through live datasets, case-based analytics projects, simulations, and AI-powered problem-solving sessions. Students gain strong command over visualization tools, data storytelling, and decision analytics through real-world applications.

description.firstDescription: Through personalized mentorship, learners build expertise in data interpretation, critical reasoning, visualization storytelling, and leadership essential skills for modern business analysts. The program also introduces advanced topics like machine learning basics, AI integration, and cloud data management, ensuring every student is equipped for the digital-first corporate world.

description.secondDescription: With 100% placement assistance, industry mentoring, and networking sessions, Teksversity ensures that every graduate becomes job-ready to solve complex business challenges using data-driven insights and innovation

keyPoints: Live data modeling and visualization workshops.
Machine learning and AI application modules.
Advanced Excel, SQL, and Power BI training.
Dedicated data analytics mentors and coaches.
24/7 online learning access and recorded sessions.
Regular progress reports and feedback loops.
Personalized study plans and flexible learning.
Resume & LinkedIn optimization for analytics roles.
Mock interviews and technical skill assessments.
Career counseling and skill development sessions.
Ongoing soft skills and communication training.
Virtual data summits and expert webinars.
Guest interactions with data leaders and professionals.

heading: Download Our
Course Brochure
downloadOurCourseBrochure.description:
Get a detailed look at the Data Analytics Bachelor’s Degree program with insights into its modules, projects, and skill development roadmap. The brochure provides complete information on curriculum design, certification opportunities, and placement pathways that make you a globally competitive data professional.
Take the next step toward your future with Teksversity’s mentorship-driven, analytics-powered learning model. Learn how this online Data Analytics degree transforms your analytical potential into a high-demand business career.
downloadOurCourseBrochure.subHeading: What You’ll Get in the Brochure:

heading: Teksversity
Online Admission Process
OnlineAdmissionProcedure.description: Starting your academic journey is now simpler than ever with our streamlined online admission process. This guide outlines the straightforward steps, from creating your personal student account and submitting basic application details to uploading necessary documents and completing the secure fee payment, all leading to a quick verification and instant admission confirmation.

heading: Upload Documents
steps.details: Submit required certificates and ID proofs.

heading: Document Verification
steps.details: Quick review of documents and payment

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
